author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
content: The kickoff integration agent deleted ~200 lines of tests when integrating the preflight changes. Need to restore all tests and update the two preflight-specific ones (test_preflight_check_passes_when_commands_available and test_preflight_check_missing_command_includes_hint) for the new function signature: preflight_check(&ContainerMode, &VerifyLevel) -> Result<PreflightResult> instead of preflight_check(&ContainerMode, bool) -> Result<()>
